title: selaginella caulescens var. belulla
intro: Selaginella caulescens var. belulla, also known as the Belulla spikemoss, is a type of plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family, often referred to as a spikemoss or a resurrection plant due to its ability to revive itself from a desiccated state. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The Belulla spikemoss is traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, thanks to its antiseptic and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Selaginella caulescens var. belulla can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often employed to promote overall well-being and alleviate respiratory problems.
